name: Visit Trinidad - Submit Your Event
public_facing_note: Submit visitor-relevant Trinidad events for review on the Visit Trinidad calendar.
best_for: Events open to visitors, festivals, arts events, downtown happenings
notes: Two-week lead time recommended; publication is discretionary.

name: Visit Trinidad - Tourism Marketing Request Form
public_facing_note: Request broader tourism support that may include the calendar, Colorado.com, Visit Trinidad social channels, PR sharing, or a blog post.
best_for: Larger campaigns, visitor-facing events, promotions, tourism news
notes: Good high-value routing path, not just a calendar.

name: Trinidad & Las Animas County Chamber of Commerce
public_facing_note: Use the chamber calendar and business network for local business, member, and community events.
best_for: Business events, ribbon cuttings, networking, member promotions
notes: Search results show events calendar; submission process needs direct confirmation.

name: CREATE Trinidad
public_facing_note: Use for arts, culture, creative-sector events, and Space to Create / creative district visibility.
best_for: Gallery events, workshops, performances, creative entrepreneurship events
notes: Page invites users to contact them about missing places/resources; formal event submission process needs confirmation.

name: World Journal
public_facing_note: Send local events to the World Journal events desk for weekly regional event coverage consideration.
best_for: Community events, nonprofit events, arts/culture, public meetings, local announcements
notes: Footer lists event email and Monday 4pm deadline for stories/events/ads/classifieds.

name: Huerfano County Chamber of Commerce - Submit an Event
public_facing_note: Submit Huerfano County events to the chamber calendar; chamber members have priority.
best_for: Business events, community events, fundraisers, networking, visitor-facing local events
notes: Page asks users to allow up to five business days; urgent items can email lehl@huerfano.org.

name: Spanish Peaks Country - Submit an Event
public_facing_note: Submit Huerfano-area events to the Spanish Peaks Country tourism calendar.
best_for: Visitor-facing events, festivals, markets, arts, outdoor events
notes: Already in guide; keep as top Huerfano route.

name: Huerfano County Government Events
public_facing_note: Use for county meetings and civic/public events; verify whether non-county public events can be listed.
best_for: Public meetings, county community center events, civic notices
notes: Calendar exists; submission path not clearly public.

name: Visit Angel Fire - List Your Event
public_facing_note: Submit Angel Fire events for review by the Village of Angel Fire tourism calendar.
best_for: Visitor-facing Angel Fire events, markets, resort-adjacent events, family activities
notes: Submission does not guarantee inclusion.

name: Angel Fire Chamber - Event Schedule
county_scope: Colfax County / Angel Fire / Moreno Valley
public_facing_note: Email the Angel Fire Chamber to submit an event and check the master calendar before planning.
best_for: Angel Fire and Moreno Valley events, chamber/community events
notes: Page lists Chamber and Visitor Center phone numbers and advises verifying dates.

name: Angel Fire Chamber Event Calendar
county_scope: Colfax County / Angel Fire / Moreno Valley
public_facing_note: Use as the Angel Fire master calendar and visibility check before scheduling regional events.
best_for: Scheduling checks, chamber events, visitor-facing Moreno Valley events
notes: Formal add-event path appears through chamber email and Visit Angel Fire form.

name: KRTN Enchanted Air Radio Calendar
public_facing_note: Use as a Colfax-area community calendar and radio visibility lead; verify the current submission contact before promising posting.
best_for: Raton, Cimarron, Maxwell, Springer, and cross-border community events
notes: Calendar is active; direct submission path not located in this sweep.

name: City of Raton Community Events
public_facing_note: Use for city-recognized community events and official local calendar visibility.
best_for: Civic events, public events, city-linked celebrations
notes: Calendar exists; public submission process needs confirmation.

name: Explore Raton Events
public_facing_note: Use as a visitor-facing Raton event page and tourism context route.
best_for: Major Raton festivals, visitor-facing community events, downtown activities
notes: Events page exists; formal submission path not found in this sweep.

name: LocalStash / Weekender SoCO & NoNM
posting_route: Create public Facebook event, then contact LocalStash
public_facing_note: Use as a regional amplification lead for Southern Colorado and Northern New Mexico events; LocalStash appears to rely heavily on public Facebook events.
best_for: Regional events, tourism-adjacent events, cross-county arts/music/community happenings
notes: Facebook result says Weekender is now LocalStash and uses FB Events; verify direct submission/contact before public claims.

name: Colorado.com Event or Business Listing
public_facing_note: Submit or update tourism-related event and business listings through Colorado Tourism Office routes.
best_for: Visitor-facing Colorado events, tourism businesses, festivals, attractions
notes: Colorado.com links to submit/update event or business listings.

name: Colorado Tourism Partner Registration
public_facing_note: Create a free Colorado.com tourism partner listing for eligible tourism-related businesses/events with physical Colorado addresses.
best_for: Tourism-related Colorado businesses/events needing statewide discovery
notes: Physical Colorado address and tourism relevance required.

name: New Mexico Tourism Department Partner Portal / Work Together
posting_route: Partner portal / story and event routes
public_facing_note: Use NMTD routes for tourism business listings, event listings, New Mexico Magazine consideration, news, and visitor-information distribution.
best_for: Tourism-related Colfax County events, attractions, visitor-facing programs
notes: Page references partner portal, New Mexico Magazine event/story consideration, and visitor information distribution.

name: KRCC Community Calendar
public_facing_note: Submit events to KRCC's public community calendar for review.
best_for: Arts, culture, nonprofit, community and for-profit events with Southern Colorado audience fit
notes: KRCC approves submissions and limits volume per organization.

name: KUNM Community Calendar
public_facing_note: Submit New Mexico events to KUNM's self-serve community calendar for staff review.
best_for: Colfax/Raton events with statewide or northern New Mexico audience fit
notes: Calendar listing and on-air mention are not guaranteed.

name: Colorado Fun Guide Magazine
public_facing_note: Submit public entertainment-oriented events to Colorado Fun Guide for possible website or magazine inclusion.
best_for: Southern Colorado arts, music, festivals, food, history, kids/family, sports, theater, visual arts
notes: No account required; all events reviewed.

name: Southwest Contemporary Calendar
public_facing_note: Submit free arts and culture events taking place in Colorado or New Mexico for moderated listing.
best_for: Gallery openings, exhibitions, performances, artist talks, arts workshops, calls for artists
notes: Requires high-quality non-poster image; publication subject to approval.

name: PeakRadar
public_facing_note: Use only for events that plausibly fit PeakRadar's Pikes Peak regional arts and entertainment audience.
best_for: Southern Colorado arts/culture events with regional pull; use carefully outside El Paso/Teller/Fremont
notes: Site says users can list events; coverage is Pikes Peak region, so tri-county fit should be verified.

name: Facebook Events
public_facing_note: Create a public event from the organizer's page so local groups, partners, and LocalStash-style aggregators can discover/share it.
best_for: Almost every local event; especially music, markets, fundraisers, classes, festivals
notes: Pair with the relevant group/page rules; do not spam groups.

name: Eventbrite
public_facing_note: Use for free or ticketed events that need a public landing page, registration, or ticketing link.
best_for: Classes, workshops, festivals, fundraisers, performances, tours
notes: Useful as the canonical event URL to submit to calendars.

name: Huerfano County Events Facebook Group
public_facing_note: Post or request approval for Huerfano County community events after checking group rules.
best_for: Community events, markets, concerts, family activities, openings
notes: Search result says group is open for community event posts; rules/admin approval need verification.

name: Trinidad Area Upcoming Events Facebook Group
public_facing_note: Post or request approval for Trinidad-area event announcements after checking group rules.
best_for: Trinidad events, markets, arts, entertainment, community gatherings
notes: Public search result shows event posting activity; group rules need verification.
